title: WinTune Backup Manifest
description: JSON manifest created by BackupManager.ps1 for each apply session. Used by Revert-Session to undo changes.

session.description: Session timestamp (yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss). Used as the -Session parameter for revert.

profile.description: Name of the profile that was applied.

restorePoint.description: System Restore Point name, if successfully created. Null if unavailable or failed.

registryBackup.description: Path to the .reg file containing exported registry keys.

changes.description: Ordered list of changes made during the session. Reverted in reverse order.

newValue.description: Value after the tweak was applied.

error.description: Error message if success is false.
